name: trade_customs_port_security_scanner_kestrel_ind_col
premise: A whistleblower submission and a customer complaint surfaced the same underlying issue through different evidence chains. In Trade & Customs, the situation tagged internally around trade customs port security scanner kestrel ind col has converged with local pressure in the Port corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A union or patient advocate group is on the line demanding a written commitment before the next operational shift. An internal red-team note and a customer ticket describe the same failure mode with incompatible timelines. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. No option cleanly satisfies both individual and collective; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Mateo Silva
agents.identity: I am Mateo Silva, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Trade & Customs. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat collective as disposable collateral every time individual spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Hector Okoye
agents.identity: I am Hector Okoye, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Trade & Customs. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so individual cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes collective in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will freeze the riskiest workflow steps and staff a manual bridge until equity and error-rate checks clear—trading speed for defensibility on collective.
I will let the fastest operational path proceed under heightened monitoring and rollback triggers—trading some certainty on collective for immediate traction on individual.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Mateo Silva must choose under individual versus collective. What does Mateo Silva do?
